rules.statement: Every atomic action declaring `artifact_types: [X]` in action_risk.yaml MUST appear in artifact_type X's `supported_actions` array, and every entry in an artifact_type's `supported_actions` MUST correspond to a registered atomic action whose action_risk.yaml entry declares `artifact_types: [X]`. The two sets — authored (artifact_type `supported_actions`) and registered (action_risk.yaml `artifact_types`) — MUST be equal for each type.
rules.rationale: ADR-092-A (triggered by ADR-121 T5b). F-43 cognate of `sensor_supported_by_declaration` (F-42, sensor_taxonomy.json). Ships at `reporting`; promotes to `blocking` at Phase 7 alongside the sensor rule. Completes the F-41 ↔ F-42 ↔ F-43 coherence triad.
